codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested feature scope: cross-tab profile lifecycle propagation (lock/clear), deterministic modal precedence (ClearCredentials > SigningFailed > PolicyPrompt), and no regressions introduced in setup-route safety guards (already present, no feature code changes required).

issues.description: The console-error filter allows any message matching /WebSocket connection to /, which can mask unexpected websocket regressions beyond the intended loopback refusal noise for this test. Narrowing the filter to the specific expected URL/error combination would keep signal quality higher.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure and handoff metadata are out of sync in practice: the worker skipped agent-browser verification but still reported followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md:23 requires followedProcedure=false when agent-browser is omitted; handoff 2026-04-23T01-13-21-100Z__m7-multi-tab-and-modal-stack__3ea1c98c-1511-4b44-b149-a3221516ebd3.json:105 shows followedProcedure=true and :108-110 documents skipping agent-browser.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Known pre-existing issue reporting guidance was not followed in the handoff, suggesting enforcement/checklist drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:97-99 says known pre-existing issues must not be re-reported in discoveredIssues; handoff file line 97 includes a discoveredIssues entry for the known nested-button warning.

summary: Review result: pass. Feature behavior is implemented as intended and commit changes are coherent; one non-blocking test robustness issue was noted, plus two shared-state observations around procedure/convention adherence.
